## Definition of Ready Checklist

Pod C must confirm all items before starting work. If any are missing, reject the issue and request the missing items from Pod A.

- [ ] Business context provided
- [ ] Scope defined
- [ ] Non-goals stated
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are specific and testable
- [ ] Required tests identified
- [ ] Linked documents attached
- [ ] Risk category assigned
- [ ] Pod B review status confirmed
- [ ] Kerem approval status confirmed
- [ ] Synthetic data examples provided where relevant
